---
title: "Math 3034 Project"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())

library(readxl)
library(dplyr)

# Load data
data <- read_excel("C:/Users/mihre/OneDrive/Documents/Housing prices in major Canadian cities.xlsx")

# Keep only valid observations
data <- data %>%
  filter(!is.na(Price), !is.na(City))

# Basic setup
N <- nrow(data)
y <- data$Price

cat("Population size N =", N, "\n")
cat("Number of cities =", length(unique(data$City)), "\n")

# True population values
pop_mean <- mean(y)
pop_total <- sum(y)
pop_variance <- var(y)


cat("True population mean =", pop_mean, "\n")
cat("True population total =", pop_total, "\n")
cat("True population variance =", pop_variance, "\n")

# ============================================
# 1. SRSWOR
# ============================================

set.seed(123)

# calculating sample size using relative tolerable error (e = 0.02)
e <- 0.02
alpha <- 0.05
zalphaover2 = 1.96
estar <- e * pop_mean
n0 <- ((zalphaover2)^2 * pop_variance) / (estar^2)
n <- ceiling(n0)
n

sample_ind_wor <- sample(1:N, n, replace = FALSE)
sample_length <- length(sample(1:N, n, replace = FALSE))
sample_length
sample_wor <- data[sample_ind_wor, ]

y_wor <- sample_wor$Price

# Estimated mean 
ybar_wor <- mean(y_wor)

# sample variance
sy2_wor  <- var(y_wor)

#estimated total
t_hat_wor <- N * ybar_wor

# variance and standard error of the sample(estimated) mean
v_ybar_wor <- (1 - n/N) * sy2_wor / n
se_ybar_wor <- sqrt(v_ybar_wor)

# variance and standard error of the estimated population total
v_t_hat_wor <- N^2 * v_ybar_wor
se_t_hat_wor <- sqrt(v_t_hat_wor)

cat("\n--- SRSWOR ---\n")
cat("Sample size =", n, "\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_wor, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_wor, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_wor, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_wor, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_wor, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_wor, "\n")

# ============================================================
# 2. SRSWR i: keeping all the samples including the duplicates
# ============================================================
set.seed(123)

# getting our sample
sample_ind_wr <- sample(1:N, n, replace = TRUE)
sample_wr <- data[sample_ind_wr, ]

number_of_duplicates <- length(sample_ind_wr) -length(unique(sample_ind_wr))

y_wr <- sample_wr$Price

# mean and variance of the sample
ybar_wr <- mean(y_wr)
sy2_wr  <- var(y_wr)

# estimated total
t_hat_wr <- N * ybar_wr

# variance and standard error of the estimated mean 
v_ybar_wr <- sy2_wr / n
se_ybar_wr <- sqrt(v_ybar_wr)

# variance and standard error of the estimated total 
v_t_hat_wr <- N^2 * v_ybar_wr
se_t_hat_wr <- sqrt(v_t_hat_wr)


cat("\n--- SRSWR_i ---\n")
cat("Sample size =", n, "\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_wr, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_wr, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_wr, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_wr, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_wr, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_wr, "\n")


# ============================================
# 3. SRSWR ii: removing all the duplicates
# ============================================

# getting our sample
sample_ind_wr <- sample(1:N, n, replace = TRUE)
sample_ind_unique <- unique(sample_ind_wr)

sample_unique <- data[sample_ind_unique, ]
y_unique <- sample_unique$Price


# our sample size after removing all the duplicates
m <- length(sample_ind_unique)
m

# mean and variance of our sample
ybar_unique <- mean(y_unique)
s2_unique <- var(y_unique)

# estimated total
t_hat_unique <- N * ybar_unique

# variance and standard error of the estimated mean
v_ybar_unique <- (1 - m/N) * s2_unique / m
se_ybar_unique <- sqrt(v_ybar_unique)

# variance and standard error of the estimated total
v_t_hat_unique <- N^2 * v_ybar_unique
se_t_hat_unique <- sqrt(v_t_hat_unique)

cat("\n--- SRSWR_ii ---\n")
cat("Sample size (unique) =", m, "\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_unique, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_unique, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_unique, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_unique, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_unique, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_unique, "\n")


# ========================================================
# 4. Stratified Sampling by City - Proportional Allocation
# ========================================================
set.seed(123)

strata_names <- sort(unique(data$City))
H <- length(strata_names)

# we have 45 stratums
print(H)

Nh <- table(data$City)
Wh <- Nh / N

nh_prop <- round(n * Wh)

# Fixing the rounding so the total sample size = n
diff_n <- n - sum(nh_prop)
if(diff_n != 0){
  nh_prop[1] <- nh_prop[1] + diff_n
}

# sum of the starutum sample sizes
print(sum(nh_prop))

strata_results_prop <- data.frame(
  City = names(Nh),
  Nh = as.numeric(Nh),
  Wh = as.numeric(Wh),
  nh = as.numeric(nh_prop),
  ybar_h = NA,
  s2_h = NA
)

for(h in 1:H){
  city_h <- strata_results_prop$City[h]
  Nh_h <- strata_results_prop$Nh[h]
  nh_h <- strata_results_prop$nh[h]

  data_h <- data %>% filter(City == city_h)
  samp_h <- data_h[sample(1:Nh_h, nh_h, replace = FALSE), ]

  strata_results_prop$ybar_h[h] <- mean(samp_h$Price)
  strata_results_prop$s2_h[h] <- var(samp_h$Price)
}

# the sample mean
ybar_st_prop <- sum(strata_results_prop$Wh * strata_results_prop$ybar_h)
# estimated total
t_hat_st_prop <- N * ybar_st_prop

# variance and standard error of the estimated mean
v_ybar_st_prop <- sum(
  (strata_results_prop$Wh^2) *
    (1/strata_results_prop$nh - 1/strata_results_prop$Nh) *
    strata_results_prop$s2_h
)
se_ybar_st_prop <- sqrt(v_ybar_st_prop)

# variance and standard error of the estimated total
v_t_hat_st_prop <- N^2 * v_ybar_st_prop
se_t_hat_st_prop <- sqrt(v_t_hat_st_prop)

cat("\n--- Stratified Proportional ---\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_st_prop, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_st_prop, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_st_prop, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_st_prop, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_st_prop, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_st_prop, "\n")

strata_results_prop$SE_ybar_h <- NA
strata_results_prop$T_hat_h <- NA

for(h in 1:H){
  city_h <- strata_results_prop$City[h]
  Nh_h <- strata_results_prop$Nh[h]
  nh_h <- strata_results_prop$nh[h]

  data_h <- data %>% filter(City == city_h)

  samp_h <- data_h[sample(1:Nh_h, nh_h, replace = FALSE), ]

  ybar_h <- mean(samp_h$Price)
  s2_h <- var(samp_h$Price)


  strata_results_prop$ybar_h[h] <- ybar_h
  strata_results_prop$s2_h[h] <- s2_h

  # Total per each stratum
  strata_results_prop$T_hat_h[h] <- Nh_h * ybar_h

  # variance and Standard error of the mean per stratum
  var_ybar_h <- (1 - nh_h/Nh_h) * s2_h / nh_h
  strata_results_prop$SE_ybar_h[h] <- sqrt(var_ybar_h)
}

strata_results_prop

# ==================================================
# 5. Stratified Sampling by City - Neyman Allocation
# ==================================================
set.seed(123)

Sh_df <- data %>%
  group_by(City) %>%
  summarise(Sh = sd(Price), .groups = "drop")

neyman_df <- data.frame(
  City = names(Nh),
  Nh = as.numeric(Nh)
) %>%
  left_join(Sh_df, by = "City")

nh_neyman_raw <- n * (neyman_df$Nh * neyman_df$Sh) / sum(neyman_df$Nh * neyman_df$Sh)
nh_neyman <- round(nh_neyman_raw)

# Ensure no stratum gets zero
nh_neyman[nh_neyman == 0] <- 1

# Fix total sample size
diff_n <- n - sum(nh_neyman)
if(diff_n != 0){
  nh_neyman[1] <- nh_neyman[1] + diff_n
}

neyman_df$nh <- nh_neyman
neyman_df$Wh <- neyman_df$Nh / N
neyman_df$ybar_h <- NA
neyman_df$s2_h <- NA
neyman_df$SE_ybar_h <- NA
neyman_df$T_hat_h <- NA

for(h in 1:nrow(neyman_df)){
  city_h <- neyman_df$City[h]
  Nh_h <- neyman_df$Nh[h]
  nh_h <- min(neyman_df$nh[h], Nh_h)

  neyman_df$nh[h] <- nh_h

  data_h <- data %>% filter(City == city_h)
  samp_h <- data_h[sample(1:Nh_h, nh_h, replace = FALSE), ]

  ybar_h <- mean(samp_h$Price)
  s2_h <- var(samp_h$Price)

  neyman_df$ybar_h[h] <- ybar_h
  neyman_df$s2_h[h] <- s2_h
  neyman_df$T_hat_h[h] <- Nh_h * ybar_h

  var_ybar_h <- (1 - nh_h / Nh_h) * s2_h / nh_h
  neyman_df$SE_ybar_h[h] <- sqrt(var_ybar_h)
}

# Estimated mean and total
ybar_st_neyman <- sum(neyman_df$Wh * neyman_df$ybar_h)
t_hat_st_neyman <- N * ybar_st_neyman

# Variance and SE of estimated mean
v_ybar_st_neyman <- sum(
  (neyman_df$Wh^2) *
    (1 / neyman_df$nh - 1 / neyman_df$Nh) *
    neyman_df$s2_h
)
se_ybar_st_neyman <- sqrt(v_ybar_st_neyman)

# Variance and SE of estimated total
v_t_hat_st_neyman <- N^2 * v_ybar_st_neyman
se_t_hat_st_neyman <- sqrt(v_t_hat_st_neyman)

cat("\n--- Stratified Neyman ---\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_st_neyman, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_st_neyman, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_st_neyman, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_st_neyman, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_st_neyman, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_st_neyman, "\n")

# Print stratum-level Neyman results
neyman_df


# ===================================================
# 6. One-Stage Cluster Sampling using City as Cluster
# ===================================================
set.seed(123)

cluster_totals <- data %>%
  group_by(City) %>%
  summarise(
    cluster_total = sum(Price),
    cluster_size = n(),
    cluster_mean = mean(Price),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cluster_names <- cluster_totals$City
K <- nrow(cluster_totals)

# Sample about half the cities
k <- ceiling(K / 2)

sampled_clusters <- sample(cluster_names, k, replace = FALSE)

cluster_sample <- cluster_totals %>%
  filter(City %in% sampled_clusters)

# the estimated total
tbar_cluster <- mean(cluster_sample$cluster_total)
t_hat_cluster1 <- K * tbar_cluster

s_t2 <- var(cluster_sample$cluster_total)

# the variance and standard error of the estimated total
v_t_hat_cluster1 <- K^2 * (1 - k/K) * s_t2 / k
se_t_hat_cluster1 <- sqrt(v_t_hat_cluster1)

# the estimated mean, variance and standard error of the estimated mean
ybar_cluster1 <- t_hat_cluster1 / N
se_ybar_cluster1 <- se_t_hat_cluster1 / N
v_ybar_cluster1 = (se_ybar_cluster1)^2

cat("\n--- One-Stage Cluster ---\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_cluster1, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_cluster1, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_cluster1, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_cluster1, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_cluster1, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_cluster1, "\n")

cluster_sample$T_hat_i <- cluster_sample$cluster_total

print(cluster_sample, n = Inf)

# ============================================
# 7. Two-Stage Cluster Sampling using City as Cluster
# ============================================
set.seed(123)

cluster_names <- sort(unique(data$City))
K2 <- length(cluster_names)

# Stage 1: sampling  about half the cities
k2 <- ceiling(K2 / 2)
sampled_clusters2 <- sample(cluster_names, k2, replace = FALSE)

# Stage 2: sampling m listings within each selected city
m <- 50

cluster_results2 <- data.frame(
  City = sampled_clusters2,
  Nh = NA,
  mh = NA,
  ybar_h = NA,
  s2_h = NA
)

for(i in 1:k2){
  city_i <- sampled_clusters2[i]
  data_i <- data %>% filter(City == city_i)

  Nh_i <- nrow(data_i)
  mh_i <- min(m, Nh_i)

  samp_i <- data_i[sample(1:Nh_i, mh_i, replace = FALSE), ]

  cluster_results2$Nh[i] <- Nh_i
  cluster_results2$mh[i] <- mh_i
  cluster_results2$ybar_h[i] <- mean(samp_i$Price)
  cluster_results2$s2_h[i] <- var(samp_i$Price)
}

# the estimated total and mean
t_hat_cluster2 <- (K2 / k2) * sum(cluster_results2$Nh * cluster_results2$ybar_h)
ybar_cluster2 <- t_hat_cluster2 / N

cluster_est_totals <- cluster_results2$Nh * cluster_results2$ybar_h
s_u2 <- var(cluster_est_totals)

v1 <- K2^2 * (1 - k2/K2) * s_u2 / k2

v2 <- (K2 / k2) * sum(
  cluster_results2$Nh^2 *
    (1 - cluster_results2$mh / cluster_results2$Nh) *
    cluster_results2$s2_h / cluster_results2$mh
)

# the variance and standard error of the estimated total
v_t_hat_cluster2 <- v1 + v2
se_t_hat_cluster2 <- sqrt(v_t_hat_cluster2)

# the variance and standard error of the estimated mean
se_ybar_cluster2 <- se_t_hat_cluster2 / N
v_ybar_cluster2 <- (se_ybar_cluster2)^2

cat("\n--- Two-Stage Cluster ---\n")
cat("Estimated mean =", ybar_cluster2, "\n")
cat("Estimated total =", t_hat_cluster2, "\n")
cat("Variance(mean) =", v_ybar_cluster2, "\n")
cat("Variance(total) =", v_t_hat_cluster2, "\n")
cat("SE(mean) =", se_ybar_cluster2, "\n")
cat("SE(total) =", se_t_hat_cluster2, "\n")

cluster_results2$T_hat_h <- cluster_results2$Nh * cluster_results2$ybar_h
cluster_results2


# ============================================
# 8. Final Comparison Table
# ============================================
results <- data.frame(
  Method = c(
    "SRSWOR",
    "SRSWR_i",
    "SRSWR_ii",
    "Stratified Proportional",
    "Stratified Neyman",
    "One-Stage Cluster",
    "Two-Stage Cluster"
  ),
  Estimated_Mean = c(
    ybar_wor,
    ybar_wr,
    ybar_unique,
    ybar_st_prop,
    ybar_st_neyman,
    ybar_cluster1,
    ybar_cluster2
  ),
  Estimated_Total = c(
    t_hat_wor,
    t_hat_wr,
    t_hat_unique,
    t_hat_st_prop,
    t_hat_st_neyman,
    t_hat_cluster1,
    t_hat_cluster2
  ),
   Var_Mean = c(
    v_ybar_wor,
    v_ybar_wr,
    v_ybar_unique,
    v_ybar_st_prop,
    v_ybar_st_neyman,
    v_ybar_cluster1,
    v_ybar_cluster2
   ),
  Var_Total = c(
    v_t_hat_wor,
    v_t_hat_wr,
    v_t_hat_unique,
    v_t_hat_st_prop,
    v_t_hat_st_neyman,
    v_t_hat_cluster1,
    v_t_hat_cluster2
  )
)

results$True_Mean <- pop_mean
results$True_Total <- pop_total
results$Mean_Error <- results$Estimated_Mean - results$True_Mean
results$Total_Error <- results$Estimated_Total - results$True_Total



cat("\n--- Final Comparison Table ---\n")
print(results)


```
